notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: TJ Rumfield singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Hunter Goodman to 3rd. TJ Rumfield to 2nd. TJ Rumfield advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by right fielder Wilyer Abreu.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, second baseman Anthony Seigler to shortstop Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras. TJ Rumfield out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.
